title: Amendment #1 — Northwind Service Agreement
summary: First amendment to the Northwind–Clearwater Service Agreement, revising payment terms, extending scope to include Phase 2, and updating the delivery timeline.
original_purpose: the design, development, and deployment of a cloud-based data integration platform
amendment_1_description: Payment terms revised from monthly to milestone-based
amendment_1_was: Monthly installments of $29,000.00 due on the first business day of each month
amendment_1_now: Milestone-based payments: 30% at kickoff ($104,400), 40% at UAT ($139,200), 30% at go-live ($104,400)
amendment_3_description: Phase 2 analytics module added to scope
amendment_3_now: Scope expanded to include Phase 2 real-time analytics dashboard as described in Schedule A-2
